title: Grim Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack on Grim Finance vault using flash loans

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls depositFor() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: Multiple calls to depositFor() in the same transaction
monitoring_rules: BLOCK depositFor() if preceded by FLASHLOAN in the same transaction
summary: The attack exploited a reentrancy vulnerability in the depositFor() function of Grim Boost Vault using flash loans. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing calls to depositFor() immediately following a flash loan.
